payload.answer: Memory deferred due to ambiguous temporal scope. Use `/brain remember [explicit_date] [weather]` for durable storage.

entity_resolution.reason: Temporal reference 'today' lacks explicit date context; cannot guarantee durability beyond current session.

details: Ambiguous temporal reference 'today' prevents durable commit.
Memory stored as ephemeral context only.

repair_options: Explicitly specify date (e.g., '2023-11-15 weather is cloudy')
Tag as session-only (e.g., 'Today (session) weather is cloudy')
